content: APScheduler 3.11.3 (latest stable PyPI — 4.x is still pre-release). Use BackgroundScheduler + CronTrigger.from_crontab(). scheduler.add_job(fn, trigger, args=[url], id=name). Call scheduler.start() then block main thread. For httpx async calls from sync APScheduler jobs: use asyncio.run() inside each job function or use httpx.Client() (sync client) since APScheduler 3.x jobs run in threads.
